item.title: Honeyville, Inc: (BULK) SPL-BEV Banana CWT (Banana Smoothie); Super Sack Tote Item# 355-0099 Recall
item.product: (BULK) SPL-BEV Banana CWT (Banana Smoothie); Super Sack Tote Item# 355-0099
item.summary: Firm received and used potentially contaminated (Salmonella) ingredient to manufacture various products. Product details: (BULK) SPL-BEV Banana CWT (Banana Smoothie); Super Sack Tote Item# 355-0099
item.affectedPeople: Distribution is to California and Utah consignees.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 4980 pounds (all on hold at customer location)
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
